snippet.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 | Official Teaser 2
snippet.description:
Look alive, choom — Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming your way this Fall!

Gear up for a return to the world of Cyberpunk, where only the ruthless survive and one wrong move can get you flatlined. This standalone story throws a fresh cast of characters into the darkest corners of Night City and brings a raw, gritty take on the world of the future. Lawless and unforgiving, this is Night City at its most brutal. 

Brought to you by CD PROJEKT RED and TRIGGER, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, SSSS.Gridman), with Kanno Ichigo (Promare, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) as the lead designer and Hugo Award winner Bartosz Sztybor as showrunner, story writer, and producer.

TRAILER MUSIC
Original Score by Tsuneo Imahori
“You Can't Run From Me” — written by Maria Kelly and Drew Polovick, performed by Rico Nasty, produced by Drew Polovick, mixed and mastered by Elliot Polokoff

Coming to Netflix, Fall 2026. 

Stay connected:
cyberpunk.net/edgerunners2
x.com/edgerunners
facebook.com/edgerunners
instagram.com/Edgerunners

Want to experience Night City on a deeper level? Play Cyberpunk 2077 and carve your own path through the dark future.

snippet.title: Werwulf - Official Trailer (2026) Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Willem Dafoe, Lily-Rose Depp
snippet.description:
Robert Eggers returns to helm this adaptation of the Wolfman myth, promising to be the most visceral and haunting experience Eggers has done so far! 

In the Medieval English countryside, a mysterious and terrible creature stalks the night, preying on any who come across its path. 

Werewulf see's Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Willem Dafoe, and Lily-Rose Depp returning from their work together on Eggers last movie; Nosferatu, for an all new terrifying take on the classic mythos. 

Werwulf comes to cinemas on December 25th 2026!

snippet.title: A Toxic Love Story | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In a glamorous California suburb, a young woman’s arrest for a violent fantasy plot becomes a sensational scandal, but the truth remains hidden behind a sophisticated web of deception. As the investigation peels back layers of betrayal, it becomes unclear who is the true victim and who is the villain in a game where everyone is playing a part.

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Last night, we let the liquor talk
I can't remember everything we said, but we said it all
You told me that you wish I was somebody you never met
But, baby, baby, something's tellin' me this ain't over yet

[Verse 1]
No way it was our last night I kissed your lips
Make you grip the sheets with your fingertips
Last bottle of Jack, we split a fifth
Just talkin' 'bout life, goin' sip for sip
Yeah, you, you know you love to fight
And I say shit I don't mean
But I'm still gon' wake up wantin' you and me

[Chorus]
I know that last night, we let the liquor talk
I can't remember everything we said, but we said it all
You told me that you wish I was somebody you never met
But, baby, baby, something's tellin' me this ain't over yet
No way it was our last night (Last night)
No way it was our last night (Last night)

[Verse 2]
No way it was the last night that we break up
I see your tail lights in the dust
You call your mama, I call your bluff
In the middle of the night, pull it right back up
Yeah, my, my friends say, "Let her go"
Your friends say, "What the hell?"
I wouldn't trade your kind of love for nothin' else

[Chorus]
Oh, baby, last night, we let the liquor talk
I can't remember everything we said, but we said it all
You told me that you wish I was somebody you never met
But, baby, baby, something's tellin' me this ain't over yet
No way it was our last night, we said we'd had enough
I can't remember everything we said, but we said too much
I know you packed your shit and slammed the door right before you left
But, baby, baby, something's tellin' me this ain't over yet
No way it was our last night (Last night)
No way it was our last night (Last night)

[Outro]
I know you said this time you really weren't comin' back again
But, baby, baby, something's tellin' me this ain't over yet
No way it was our last night (Last night)
No way it was our last night (Last night)

snippet.title: The Flintstones: Live Action (2027) - Russell Crowe, Owen Wilson, Rami Malek | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#TheFlintstones #russellcrowe #ramimalek 

Watch this The Flintstones: Live Action Concept Trailer and enter a bold What If version of Bedrock filled with family, mystery, and Stone Age adventure.

This fan-made What If concept imagines Russell Crowe as Fred Flintstone, a hardworking quarry operator whose simple life changes after a dangerous discovery beneath Slate Rock and Gravel.
Charlize Theron appears as Wilma Flintstone, Owen Wilson as Barney Rubble, Kristen Stewart as Betty Rubble, and Rami Malek as Cliff Vandercave, a cold corporate figure pushing Bedrock toward disaster.
I personally created the storyboard and visuals to explore how The Flintstones could feel as a live action family adventure with comedy, heart, prehistoric worldbuilding, and cinematic fantasy stakes.

From Dino, Pebbles, and Bamm-Bamm to hidden chambers, ancient stone seals, quarry secrets, and the colorful streets of Bedrock, this concept trailer reimagines the classic Flintstones world for a modern audience.
The story blends nostalgic characters with a bigger live action movie tone where Fred, Wilma, Barney, and Betty must protect their families from a threat buried long before Bedrock existed.
Watch till the end, subscribe for more concept trailers, and share whether you would want The Flintstones to return as a live action movie in 2027.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer. The storyboard and visuals were created by me, and this video is not affiliated with any official studio, production company, or rights holder.

snippet.title: The Strokes - Going Shopping (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official Video for “Going Shopping” by The Strokes

Reality Awaits: thestrokes.lnk.to/realityawaits

thestrokes.com
instagram.com/thestrokes
tiktok.com/@thestrokes
facebook.com/thestrokes
x.com/thestrokes

Merch: shop.thestrokes.com

"Going Shopping"

Starring Walton Goggins

Directed by Johann Rashid

Produced by Nick Ventura

LYRICS:
Like a tiger they will chase you down
With words instead of claws

They will seduce you till you reach the point
to let yourself get mauled 

The worse reality gets the less you wanna hear about it
Solidarity can be difficult when you’ve got cool stuff to lose

I wanna be a 7-foot zombie
the pay is low but I gotta do something
I’m at the mall, the song is bumping. There goes my future wife in a little red jumpsuit
I’m going away to the country
Don’t wander off too far
I’m going out my mind
Throwin' all my plans out the window
Don’t wanna waste my life
I’ll see you on the other side

I’ve been thinking about what I want to say
But I’m an old man now, at least that’s what they tell me anyway

We’ve been expanding on our greatness
Building future ruins
We’re building castles from the bones of dead trees
Molded from the shattered houses of the dead sea

I moved away to the country
I had to change my way
But I kinda miss you now

Stockbrokers flying out the window, I kinda miss that sound
'Don't wanna wake up Pa'

- 

I can’t wait, I’m going shopping
I’m at the mall, and the song is bumpin’
I want to be a 7-foot starfish
above the law like good little puppet

I’m going back to the city
I’m ‘bout to lose my mind
I’m gonna stay alive
I’m climbing out through the window
I miss the shops and malls
I’m gonna meet you there

Still throwing my phone out the window
I’m gonna soothe my soul
Can’t wait I’m going shopping

If you’re better than me you don’t have to judge me

(c) 2026 RCA Records, a division of Sony Music Entertainment


#TheStrokes #Goingshopping #WaltonGoggins
